_comment: Short opaque testids in the HTML, but readable Python variable names in the generated Robot-Framework files. idFormat is pure hash (tid-{hash} always present), variableFormat pulls component + element + key from the registry so tests stay self-documenting. Rich semantic input from the extended fingerprint (incl. wrapper-aware child_shape) means stable hashes despite cosmetic template edits. lockNames persists the resolved Python variable - if two entries collide on the bare name, the locator generator first tries to find a semantic discriminator (event handler, fieldset legend, …) for a readable suffix before falling back to _2/_3.
